chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 1358 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 6224/2020 2.For hearing of main case 11-05-2023 ***** Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, the same stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
